chapter_title.en: Chapter on the State of the Children of Polytheists and Disbelievers Who Pass Away

text: عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "تُؤَجَّجُ لَهُمْ نَارٌ فَيُقَالُ لَهُمُ اُدْخُلُوهَا فَإِنْ دَخَلُوهَا كَانَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ بَرْداً وَ سَلاَماً وَ إِنْ أَبَوْا قَالَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُمْ "هُوَ ذَا أَنَا قَدْ أَمَرْتُكُمْ فَعَصَيْتُمُونِي" فَيَأْمُرُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِهِمْ إِلَى اَلنَّارِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4741 - Imam (as) said: "A fire will be kindled for them, and it will be said to them, 'Enter it.' If they enter it, it will be cool and peaceful for them.
But if they refuse, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, will say to them:
'Behold, I had commanded you, and you disobeyed Me.'
Then Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, will command that they be taken to the Fire."
